name: Castle of Dreams - Breakout
desc: If 3 or more monsters were Special Summoned from your opponent's Deck and/or Extra Deck this turn, while you control a "Castle of Dreams" Field Spell: Destroy any number of cards on the field, then you can Special Summon 1 monster from your GY or banishment. You can only activate 1 "Castle of Dreams - Breakout" per turn.
strings: Destroy cards on the field, then Special Summon 1 monster
Special Summon 1 monster from your GY or banishment
